summary: Phase 7 Quest Invitation features testing completed. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features verified. New features: Quest invitations, accept/decline invitations, shared quest badge, Q&A modal.
passed_tests: - POST /api/quests/invitations/{id}/accept - accepts invitation and copies quest
- Accepted quest has isShared=true, ownerId, originalQuestId fields
- Accepted quest appears in user's quest list
- Declined invitation not in pending list
- New quest has isShared=false, ownerId=null, originalQuestId=null by default
- Q&A modal opens with title 'Як користуватися квестами?' - VERIFIED
- Q&A modal has 'Створення квесту' section - VERIFIED
- Q&A modal has 'Спільні квести' section - VERIFIED
- Quest creation form with title, reward, steps - VERIFIED
- Invite button (UserPlus icon) on quest card - VERIFIED
- Friends list in invite modal - VERIFIED
- Invitation shows quest title and sender name - VERIFIED
- 'Спільний' badge on accepted shared quest - VERIFIED
- No invite button on shared quests (correct behavior) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: Quest invitation flow is complete: invite → pending → accept/decline
Shared quest correctly copies all fields including steps and rewards
isShared badge correctly hides invite button on shared quests
Q&A modal provides clear instructions for quest usage
test_credentials: quest_level3_test@test.com / testpass123 (Level 5 user), quest_friend_test@test.com / testpass123 (Level 5 user)
seed_data_creation: Test users created: quest_level3_test@test.com (quest owner), quest_friend_test@test.com (friend). Friendship established between them. Test quest 'Test Quest for Invitation' created and shared.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Quest Invitation features implemented and working: 1) POST /api/quests/{id}/invite - invite friend to quest, 2) GET /api/quests/invitations - get pending invitations, 3) POST /api/quests/invitations/{id}/accept - accept and copy quest with isShared=true, 4) POST /api/quests/invitations/{id}/decline - decline invitation, 5) Q&A button (?) opens modal with quest usage instructions, 6) Invite button (UserPlus) on quest cards opens friend selection modal, 7) Invitations section shows pending invitations with accept/decline buttons, 8) 'Спільний' badge on shared quests, 9) Shared quests don't show invite button. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_quest_invitations.py. Features unlock at level 3.
